title: PS-69899 Checking WorkflowStatePermission limited to normal workflow only. Workflow Templates do not require the check.
body: PS-69899 Checking WorkflowStatePermission limited to normal workflow only. Workflow Templates do not require the check.
author: AbdulRahim1412

reviews.body:
## Pull request overview

This PR (PS-69899) limits workflow-state permission enforcement to “normal” workflow-based records so that records operating under workflow templates are not blocked by `WorkflowStatePermission` checks.

**Changes:**
- Updates the workflow-state permission check to only run when the record is not in a workflow template context.
- Clarifies the inline comment to reflect the “normal workflow only” intent.
reviews.author: copilot-pull-request-reviewer[bot]

review_comments.body: Use the existing InTemplateWorkflow() helper instead of duplicating its implementation with `WorkflowTemplateId == 0`. This keeps the “template workflow” definition centralized and avoids drift if the condition ever changes.
review_comments.author: Copilot
